calendar.matters:
REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-12-2026 Continued To Jun-24-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-03-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cynthia Sayegh for Lubia Perez and Estrella Perez, Petitioners/Proposed Co-Administrators (via Zoom).
Jennifer Bartlett, counsel for petitioners in an underlying mesothelioma matter (via Zoom).

The court confirmed there were no objections or assertions of superior priority regarding the petition for letters of administration. There being no objections, the court granted the petition for letters of administration. Lubia G. Perez and Estrella Perez are appointed co-administrators. Bond is set at $20,000, subject to increase upon discovery of additional property. Shirley Yawitz is appointed as probate referee. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for February 3, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Continued To Dec-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
